texto: I've learned that you shouldn't go through life with a catcher's mitt on both hands
autor: you need to be able to throw some things back.
explicacao: Orientação direta de you need to be able to throw some things back. sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. A afirmação “I've learned that you shouldn't go through life with a catcher's mitt on both hands” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, maya-angelou, learned, útil em momentos de reflexao.
